ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the boat */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat class */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the boat was registered for the competition */,
  "hcap" INTEGER /* Handicap points of the boat */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "boat_description" TEXT /* Description of the boat */,
  "boat_length" TEXT /* Length of the boat in meters */,
  "boat_beam" TEXT /* Beam of the boat in meters */,
  "boat_draft" TEXT /* Draft of the boat in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the boat was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the boat was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES boat_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boat class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the boat class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the boat class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date the race was held */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race type */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location where the race was held */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the boat in the race */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the boat in the race */,
  "nett_points" INTEGER /* Nett points scored by the boat in the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race schedule */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the race */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Postponed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_schedules_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, participant, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the race data */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the race data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role having the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
